description_long: This is a robust, rectangular metal safe box with a slightly rounded edge design and a muted, pale greenish-gray finish. The front features a heavy-duty door equipped with a prominent horizontal handle, a circular rotating locking mechanism, and a small oval keyhole, all made of metallic material. Above the locking components, there is an oval metallic label plate, likely indicating the brand or manufacturer. The door is mounted on two visible external hinges on the right side, allowing it to swing open. The sides and back of the safe are plain, with subtle surface wear and no additional features or openings. The overall construction suggests a secure, industrial-grade safe suitable for storing valuables in urban environments such as garages, offices, or back rooms.
description: A sturdy, pale greenish-gray metal safe box with a heavy front door, metallic handle, and locking mechanism, featuring an oval label plate and external right-side hinges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the door with a metallic handle, rotating lock, keyhole, and an oval label plate, as well as two external right-side hinges.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with the door's handle and hinges barely visible at the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, smooth back panel with subtle surface seams and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain surface, the door's handle and hinges slightly visible near the front edge.
attribute_handle_design: horizontal fixed bar handle, metallic, mounted on the front door
attribute_brand_or_manufacturer_label: oval metallic label plate above the locking mechanism, engraved or embossed
